label: Ingest Repository
description: Fetch repo files and store them as knowledge nodes in Graphonomous

label: Analyze Codebase
description: Retrieve ingested repo nodes and run LLM analysis — architecture, tech stack, patterns, dependencies

label: Query Knowledge
description: Search the knowledge graph for ingested repo content — modules, patterns, relationships

label: Graph Health
description: Check Graphonomous stats — node counts, confidence distribution, orphans, edge coverage

label: Benchmark Memory
description: Run PRISM evaluation cycles against Graphonomous — tests retention, recall, belief revision on ingested data

label: Retention Test
description: Test if Graphonomous retains repo knowledge after belief revision — stores a fact, contradicts it, checks recall
